NA = Patient not taking any drugs CHAR 2 x x
M2301_EMER_USE_AFTR_LAST_ASMT M2301 Emergent Care Since Last OASIS This field indicates whether the patient has utilized a hospital emergency department or observation unit since the last time OASIS data were collected. 00 = No
01 = Yes, used hospital emergency department WITHOUT hospital admission
02 = Yes, used hospital
